_comment: Sarah's college admissions tracking. Fields: title, category, priority (critical/important/light), due_date (YYYY-MM-DD or null), owner, status (pending/done/overdue), notes, tags (list of strings), protected_during_ap_window (bool). ap_windows: list of {start, end} date ranges when non-critical items are suppressed.

ap_windows.notes: AP exam period — suppress non-critical admissions tasks to protect Sarah's focus.

items.title: Send ACT fee waiver email to Ms. McCann
items.notes: Draft and send email requesting fee waiver letter for June ACT registration.

items.title: Register Sarah for June ACT
items.notes: June ACT registration. Requires fee waiver letter from McCann first. Check ACT.org.

items.title: Register Sarah for September ACT (backup)
items.notes: Backup September ACT registration in case June score needs improvement.

items.title: Draft Cameron science-only tutoring brief
items.notes: Brief for Cameron: Sarah needs science-section-only ACT tutoring. Define scope and schedule.

items.title: Document TOC results for college applications
items.notes: Write up Sarah's TOC (Tournament of Champions) results for the activities section. Include placement and context.

items.title: HBCU merit scholarship research
items.notes: Research merit scholarship opportunities at HBCUs. Flag top 3-5 schools with scholarship criteria.

items.title: Confirm counselor meeting deadline
items.notes: Check when school counselor needs to be engaged for letters/transcript releases. Set meeting.

items.title: Begin teacher rec groundwork
items.notes: Sarah should identify which teachers to ask. Draft the ask conversation. Do NOT wait until fall.

items.title: Monitor Morehead-Cain eligibility and timeline
items.notes: Morehead-Cain is school-nominated. Confirm eligibility criteria, nomination process, and timeline. This is passive monitoring for now.

items.title: AP exam prep — protect Sarah's focus window
items.notes: No new admissions asks during AP window (May 1-17). Only surface critical admissions items during this period.
